chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.59 of 2012 M/s Decent Packages (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus M/s Karachi Electricity Supply Co. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA 719/2020 Dated: 22.04.2024 Mr. Zeeshan Bashir holds brief for Mr. Asim Mansoor for appellant. Mr. Umair Nabi for respondent No.1. Mr. Shahid Ali Ansari for respondent No.2. Mr. Ali Hyder holds brief for Mr. Kashif Hanif for respondent No.3. -.-.- Mr. Zeeshan Bashir holding brief for Mr. Asim Mansoor, learned counsel appearing for appellant, submits that he has been instructed by the appellant not to press this appeal along with listed application as they have settled their dispute amicably out of the Court. The request is not opposed by the counsel appearing for respondents. Accordingly, instant High Court Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application. Judge Judge
